creator: ganbold-freebsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
On stock 10.2-RELEASE however it fails to register:

===>  Staging for galera-25.3.15
===>   Generating temporary packing list
install  -s -m 444 /usr/ports/databases/galera/work/galera-3-25.3.15/libgalera_smm.so  /usr/ports/databases/galera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for galera-25.3.15
===>  Checking if galera already installed
===>   Registering installation for galera-25.3.15
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/databases/galera/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/galera/AUTHORS: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/databases/galera/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/galera/README: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/galera
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/galera
